title: Playstyles
description: A fabric mod that lets you choose your playing preferences in game for 1.21.4
body:
# Playstyles Mod

This mod lets you choose playstyle settings on a per-player basis.  

## Commands

- `/playstyle` (shows a menu to select a playstyle)
- `/playstyle [mode]`  

### Supported Modes  
- **peaceful** — Mobs ignore you and won't target you.  
- **difficult** — You take 1.5x damage. 
- **retain** — You keep your inventory and XP upon death
- **normal** — Play as the server difficulty level
- **glass** — You have one heart of health!
- **berserk** — You deal x2 damage but you also take x2 damage
- **undead** — Mobs ignore you but you take damage in the sun
- **survivalist** — You cannot use crafting tables

More modes planned soon!
